I came here at first to comment on how little content had been added since the last time i played only to realize it's abandoned. WHY? This game was fuckin great! Great ratings, complied with patreon guidelines, gorgeous girls. WTF would you abandon this for?

Edit: I see a lot of speculation that Dev has returned, but there is nothing on Patreon indicating that she's back at work since Jan of 2024.

Edit2: Found her post from last month. Cautiously optimistic. LIke i said...this game is fuckin great. Hope Tessa really is back and that we start getting some Claire and Alexis content soon I'd like to see that Claire relationship mended soon since sooo many others already know...may as well bring her into the loop.
